summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P0 fixes for TeacherHubPro. All 11 backend tests passed. All 5 frontend features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/classes returns classes for sub-packet testing
Backend: GET /api/classes/{class_id}/sub-packet returns null or saved data
Backend: PUT /api/classes/{class_id}/sub-packet saves editable packet data
Backend: PUT /api/classes/{class_id}/sub-packet updates existing packet data
Backend: GET /api/semesters - teachers can view semesters
Backend: POST /api/semesters - teachers can create semesters
Backend: PUT /api/semesters/{id} - teachers can update semesters
Backend: DELETE /api/semesters/{id} - teachers can delete semesters
Backend: GET /api/subscription/status returns 'admin' status for admin users
Backend: GET /api/health - backend is healthy
Backend: POST /api/subscription/checkout endpoint exists
Frontend: Pricing page shows 'Cuenta de Administrador - Acceso Completo' badge for admin
Frontend: Pricing page 'Probar Checkout' buttons are ENABLED for admin users
Frontend: Substitute Packet - Generate Packet button works
Frontend: Substitute Packet - 'Editar Paquete' button appears after generation
Frontend: Substitute Packet - Edit mode shows 'Modo Edición' badge
Frontend: Substitute Packet - Daily routines, emergency procedures, additional notes are editable
Frontend: Substitute Packet - 'Guardar' button saves data with success toast
Frontend: Settings page - Semesters section visible
Frontend: Settings page - 'Nuevo' button opens semester creation dialog
Frontend: Settings page - Semester dialog has all required fields
Frontend: Settings page - Existing semesters displayed with edit/delete buttons
Frontend: /setup-admin page loads correctly (NOT 404)
Frontend: /setup-admin page has email input, setup key input, and submit button
seed_data_creation: Sub-packet data saved for Test English Class with test routines and emergency procedures
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 fixes verified working: 1) Pricing page admin buttons enabled with 'Probar Checkout' text, 2) Substitute Packet edit/save functionality working with new backend endpoints, 3) Semesters CRUD available for teachers in Settings page, 4) /setup-admin page loads correctly in preview environment. Test credentials: test@school.edu / testpassword (role: super_admin). Key data-testid attributes: subscribe-btn-{plan_id}, generate-packet-btn, edit-packet-btn, daily-routines-input, emergency-procedures-input, additional-notes-input, new-semester-btn

pricing_admin_buttons.details: Admin users see 'Probar Checkout' buttons that are enabled (not disabled). Badge shows 'Cuenta de Administrador - Acceso Completo'. District plan button correctly disabled when teacher count < 100.

substitute_packet_edit.details: After generating packet, 'Editar Paquete' button appears. Edit mode shows editable fields for daily routines, emergency procedures, additional notes, main office ext, nurse ext. 'Guardar' button saves data via PUT /api/classes/{class_id}/sub-packet endpoint. Success toast 'Paquete guardado' appears.

semester_crud_for_teachers.details: Semesters section visible in Settings page for all users. 'Nuevo' button opens dialog with name (EN/ES), start/end dates, year term, active toggle. Existing semesters displayed with edit/delete buttons and active toggle.

setup_admin_page.details: /setup-admin page loads correctly (not 404). Shows 'Super Admin Setup' form with email input, setup key input, and 'Become Super Admin' button. Note: User's production 404 is due to needing redeploy.

sub_packet_api.details: GET /api/classes/{class_id}/sub-packet returns saved data or null. PUT /api/classes/{class_id}/sub-packet saves/updates packet data with main_office_ext, nurse_ext, daily_routines, emergency_procedures, additional_notes fields.

notes: All P0 issues have been fixed and verified in the preview environment. The user's production 404 for /setup-admin is expected - they need to redeploy to get the fixes live. The SetupKey for /setup-admin is: TeacherHubPro2026SecureSetup
